Records.authors: He, Song, Jiang, Xuhang, Liu, Jiahao, Yang, Qinglin
Records.description: One-loop box integral with four massive internal propagators and massless external legs near $D=5-2\varepsilon$ (odd-dimensional case). UT basis consists of 1 box in $D=5-2\varepsilon$, 4 one-mass triangles and 2 bubbles in $D=3-2\varepsilon$, and 4 tadpoles in $D=1-2\varepsilon$. Canonical differential equations derived via odd-dimensional Schubert analysis, contrasted with the $D=4-2\varepsilon$ result.
Records.familyName: one-loop four-mass box with massless external legs in D=5-2eps / one-loop four-mass box with massless external legs in D=4-2eps
